cross_runtime_findings.summary: Curation branches probed tables, not columns (FR-004) — partial schemas would emit raw sqlite errors.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: column-level probes (coverage.recorded_at/percentage, gardening_tasks.status/target_module_id, gardening_log.date, unsafe_params.fixed/function_id).

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Only Malformed rolled back; Sqlite3.Error/Failure could escape with the transaction open.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: catch-all handler → best-effort ROLLBACK → Error(internal: …); CLI maps to exit 2.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: valid_stamp accepted impossible instants (2026-99-99T99:99:99Z) which would sort as 'latest' forever.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: field-range validation (month/day/hour/min/sec); regression tests added.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: low-coverage tie order undefined for same-name same-pct functions across modules.

notes: Primary + spec-compliance inline (FR-001..011 swept post-fix; unsafe-params printf template verified: filter arg matched against fixed vocabulary before SQL composition). Codex pass: 4 findings, all fixed with tests; 7 suites (96+2 tests) + selftest-health (incl. ~20 curation assertions) green.
